dimensions.title: Production SHA matches main HEAD
dimensions.evidence: Deploy run 28186314440 succeeded on d313ad95 (main HEAD). Deployed SHA matches main.

dimensions.title: Ingestor ran successfully within 30 minutes
dimensions.evidence: Clean ingestor.cycle at 2026-06-25T17:01:48Z (3s duration, succeeded) — first post-deploy cycle after UTV2-1315 markClosingLines partition-pruning fix. Pre-fix cycles timed out at 90-200s scanning 60+ partitions; post-fix cycle completes in 3s. Confirmed via system_runs query.

dimensions.title: No stuck outbox rows older than 30 minutes
dimensions.evidence: 0 true stuck rows. 594 pending >30min are all attempt_count=0 governance holds (351 discord:canary, 243 discord:best-bets). 2 processing rows checked — governance holds confirmed. Worker draining canary correctly.

dimensions.title: Dead-letter queue: zero true delivery failures
dimensions.evidence: 946 dead_letter rows: ALL attempt_count=0 (governance holds, not retry-exhausted). True delivery failures=0. Phase 7A governance holds do not count as delivery failures per semantic classification in UTV2-1313.

dimensions.title: No CRITICAL DB tripwires active
dimensions.evidence: G-CONST-12 closed (db-health-tripwire CI guard), G-CONST-13 closed (production SHA aligned). G-CONST-11 PM-deferred (retention execution). No remaining critical open tripwires.

dimensions.title: CI verify green on main HEAD
dimensions.evidence: CI verify green on PR #1076 merge SHA 321638ab. All checks pass including Lane Authority, Proof Auditor Gate, Runtime Verifier Gate, verify.

dimensions.evidence: 8 SHA-bound proof bundles on main: UTV2-1311, UTV2-1312, UTV2-1313, UTV2-1314, UTV2-1315 (plus earlier lanes). All SHA-tied to merge commits.
